scripts.qr: IP=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1 || ifconfig | awk '/^[a-z]/ {iface=$1} /inet / && iface ~ /^en/ && $2 !~ /^127/ {print $2; exit}') && [ -n "$IP" ] && evenhub qr --http --ip "$IP" --port 5173 --path / || echo "No LAN IP found"
scripts.pack: pnpm ensure:voice-model && pnpm build && evenhub pack app.json dist -o notion-ultimate-brain-even-g2.ehpk
scripts.ensure:voice-model: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='public/vosk/model.tar.gz';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('[ensure:voice-model] missing '+p+' — run pnpm fetch:voice-model');process.exit(1)}"
